name: Tex's Shrimp Enchilada Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10-oz.) diced tomatoes and, green chiles,
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp; set aside.
2. Bring the broth to a boil in a Dutch oven; add tortilla chips. Remove from heat; let stand 10 minutes.
3. Position the knife blade in the food processor bowl; add half of the broth mixture. Process until smooth, scraping down sides once.
4. Transfer the mixture to another container. Repeat the procedure with the remaining broth mixture. Return the blended mixture to the Dutch oven; stir in green chiles and diced tomatoes. Set aside.
5. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add shrimp, onion, and garlic; cook, stirring constantly, 3 to 4 minutes or until shrimp turn pink.
6. Stir into the broth mixture; cook until heated, stirring occasionally (do not boil). Stir in sour cream and cilantro.
7. Sprinkle each serving with cheeses. Serve immediately.
